name: vinuni_fee_list_mode
description: Phase 1.27a list-mode: multi-ROW tuition questions ('per-X tuition for ALL programs') that exercise the deterministic fee-matrix return (structured_lookup._match_fee with list_mode). Each lists EVERY program's value for one granularity in required_facts, with the OTHER granularities' values as forbidden_facts so a wrong-granularity or single-row/partial answer fails. Distinct per-credit value of Medicine == Other Bachelor (27,195,000). Added with the feature per the 'golden cases with features' rule; measures the list-mode coverage gain (these MISS the point path when the flag is off).

cases.question: What is the listed tuition fee per credit for all VinUni programs?
List the listed tuition fee per academic year for every program at VinUni.
What is the listed tuition fee per semester across all programs at VinUni?
